title: Agamarian
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Agamarians.jpg|thumb|right|[[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and a [[Gender/Legends|female]] Agamarian.]]
'''Agamarians''' were the native peoples of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]]. Agamar was populated mostly by [[Human/Legends|Humans]], such as [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]]. The Agamarians themselves were either evacuated or killed by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], during their takeover of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Due to their backwater lifestyle, they were deemed "dumb hicks."

{{Stub}}
